details: The agent ran commands to list all 10 merged PRs and fetched CI check data for each. It correctly identified 10 PRs with per-PR titles, authors, and CI status. The 4 PRs with failures (51721: 6 failed, 51704: 6 failed, 51618: 3 failed, 51574: 1 failed) are all confirmed by actual check data in the output. The 6 fully green PRs (51772, 51770, 51766, 51753, 51631, 51625) all showed 0 failures. Although some outputs were interleaved due to parallel execution (e.g., 51766 and 51631 had no separate visible output), the CI statuses attributed to them were all 0-failure results consistent with the data received, and the final count of 6/10 green is correct.
